title: WorkerAssignmentLedger
description: Append-only NDJSON ledger entry recording a worker assignment lifecycle event. Links task, provider, concurrency slot, and status for capacity tracking and audit.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

entryId.description: Unique identifier for this ledger entry (UUID or monotonic ID).

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this entry was recorded.

taskId.description: Worker task identifier, matching the heartbeat taskId.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this assignment targets.

prNumber.description: GitHub pull request number produced by this assignment, if applicable.

providerId.description: Identifier of the provider executing the task (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'codex-mini').

slotId.description: Concurrency slot identifier. Each slot represents one unit of live worker capacity.

status.description: Lifecycle status: assigned (slot reserved), started (work begun), completed (success), failed (error), released (slot freed after terminal state).

conflictGroup.description: Logical conflict group for parallelism control, matching the task contract.

actorRole.description: Role performing the work, from the task contract rolePacket.

pmPhase.description: Wave or phase identifier for aggregation.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the status transition (e.g. failure message on status=failed).

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for downstream analysis. Should not contain secrets or credentials.
